name: 72seasidevinyl
description: App for 72 Seaside Vinyl in Zierikzee

scripts.build: tailwindcss -i ./resources/css/app.css -o ./webroot/css/app.css && cp node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-pro/css/all.min.css webroot/css/ && cp -r node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-pro/webfonts webroot/webfonts && cp node_modules/tom-select/dist/css/tom-select.css webroot/css/ && cp node_modules/tom-select/dist/js/tom-select.complete.min.js webroot/js/
